title: NexNam — Futuristic Animated 3D Portfolio Website

requirements.text: Set up the global design system: background #050510, primary #6C63FF, secondary #00D4FF, accent #FF6B6B, text #FFFFFF/#B0B8D0. Configure Tailwind with dark mode, custom color tokens, and CSS custom properties. Use Inter for body text and Space Grotesk for headings. Apply smooth scroll behavior globally and ensure all sections have id attributes for anchor navigation.

quotes: Font: Inter for body, Syne or Space Grotesk for headings

acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind config includes custom color tokens matching the design system palette
CSS custom properties defined for all brand colors
Space Grotesk applied to all headings, Inter to body text
smooth scroll-behavior enabled globally
All sections have matching id attributes (about, services, work, team, process, contact)

requirements.text: Build a fixed glassmorphism navbar with: NexNam logo using gradient text (primary→secondary), nav links (About, Services, Work, Team, Process, Contact) as anchor links, a 'Start Project' CTA button with violet glow effect, and a mobile hamburger menu that opens a full-screen or slide-in mobile nav. Use backdrop-blur and semi-transparent background for the glassmorphism effect.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is fixed at top and visible across all scroll positions
NexNam logo text renders with gradient from #6C63FF to #00D4FF
All nav links scroll smoothly to their respective sections
'Start Project' button has a visible violet glow box-shadow
Hamburger icon appears on mobile and toggles a mobile nav menu
Navbar has backdrop-blur glassmorphism styling

requirements.text: Build a full-viewport hero section with: headline 'We Build Future-Ready Web Applications', subheadline 'Empowering startups with scalable, AI-driven digital products.', two CTA buttons ('Start Your Project' filled + 'View Our Work' outlined), a scroll indicator arrow at the bottom, and Framer Motion staggered entrance animations for text elements. The background must feature a React Three Fiber canvas with an animated wireframe icosahedron sphere that slowly rotates and floating particle field.

quotes: Background: React Three Fiber canvas with animated 3D rotating geometric sphere made of wireframe icosahedron + floating particles
Text entrance animations with Framer Motion (stagger children)

acceptanceCriteria: Section fills 100vh
Headline and subheadline render with correct copy
Both CTA buttons are present — one filled with gradient, one outlined
Three.js canvas renders an animated rotating wireframe icosahedron with floating particles
Text elements animate in with staggered Framer Motion transitions
Scroll indicator arrow is visible at the bottom of the section

requirements.text: Build an About NexNam section with: a left column containing company story text (who we are, what we build, why we build it), a right column with four animated counter stats (50+ projects, 30+ clients, 3+ years, 100% satisfaction) that count up on scroll into view. Below, render three glassmorphism cards for Mission, Vision, and Core Values. Below those, render an animated horizontal timeline showing company growth milestones: 2022 → 2023 → 2024 → 2025, with each milestone revealed via Framer Motion scroll-triggered animation.

quotes: Animated stats (50+ projects, 30+ clients, 3+ years, 100% satisfaction)
Three cards — Mission, Vision, Core Values with glassmorphism
Animated timeline showing company growth journey (2022 → 2023 → 2024 → 2025)

acceptanceCriteria: Left column has story text; right column has 4 stat counters that animate on scroll
Three glassmorphism cards render for Mission, Vision, Core Values
Timeline shows 4 milestones from 2022 to 2025
Timeline and stat animations trigger when the section scrolls into view

requirements.text: Build a Services section with headline 'What We Build' and five 3D tilt cards using react-parallax-tilt. Each card must have glassmorphism styling, a gradient border on hover, and a glow effect. Services: (1) Custom Web Application Development, (2) SaaS Product Development, (3) UI/UX Design, (4) AI Integration, (5) Performance & Optimization. Each card includes an SVG or emoji icon, title, and description.
acceptanceCriteria: Headline 'What We Build' is displayed
Five service cards render with correct titles and descriptions
Cards tilt on mouse hover via react-parallax-tilt
Each card has glassmorphism background and a gradient border visible on hover
Glow effect activates on hover

requirements.text: Build a Portfolio / Case Studies section with headline 'Our Work' and 3–4 project cards. Each card must display: a CSS 3D device mockup (laptop frame with screenshot placeholder area), project name, technology tags, a brief Problem/Solution/Result summary, a hover lift + glow effect, and an 'Explore Case Study' CTA button. Projects: FinTech Dashboard, AI SaaS Platform, E-commerce Web App, Healthcare Portal.

quotes: CSS 3D device mockups (laptop frame with screenshot area)
FinTech Dashboard, AI SaaS Platform, E-commerce Web App, Healthcare Portal

acceptanceCriteria: Section headline 'Our Work' is displayed
Four project cards render with correct project names and tags
Each card includes a CSS device mockup frame
Problem/Solution/Result brief text is present on each card
Hover state applies lift transform and glow box-shadow
'Explore Case Study' button is present on each card

requirements.text: Build a Founder & Co-Founder section with a premium centered layout. Two cards side by side: (1) Alex Morgan — CEO & Founder, (2) Sarah Chen — CTO & Co-Founder. Each card has a gradient avatar circle with initials, name, role, a short bio, and a LinkedIn icon placeholder link. Include a centered italic vision quote with stylized quotation marks. Apply a radial gradient glow behind both cards as a decorative background layer.

quotes: Image placeholder: gradient avatar circle with initials
Vision quote in italic with quote marks
Background: radial gradient glow behind cards

acceptanceCriteria: Two team cards render side by side (stacked on mobile)
Each card shows gradient avatar circle with initials, name, title, and bio
LinkedIn icon is present as a placeholder anchor on each card
Italic vision quote with decorative quotation marks is displayed
Radial gradient glow is visible behind the cards

requirements.text: Build a Technology Stack section with headline 'Powered By Modern Technology'. Render an animated floating grid of technology name badges/icons with CSS up-down float animations and staggered delays. Technologies to include: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, OpenAI, Stripe, Tailwind, GraphQL, Redis, Kubernetes, Webflow. Apply a subtle grid-lines background pattern to the section.

quotes: Animated floating grid of tech logos/icons
CSS animation: floating up-down with stagger delays
React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, OpenAI, Stripe, Tailwind, GraphQL, Redis, Kubernetes, Webflow

acceptanceCriteria: Headline 'Powered By Modern Technology' is displayed
All 15 listed technologies appear as styled badges or icon tiles
Each badge has a continuous floating up-down CSS animation
Staggered animation delays create a wave-like floating effect
Section background has a visible subtle grid line pattern

requirements.text: Build a Testimonials section with headline 'What Our Clients Say'. Implement an Embla Carousel with auto-scroll. Include 4–5 testimonial cards, each with: a colored avatar circle placeholder, a quote text, client name/company/role, a 5-star rating display, and a measurable result badge (e.g., '300% Revenue Growth'). Cards use glassmorphism styling with smooth slide transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Headline 'What Our Clients Say' is displayed
Embla Carousel renders with auto-scroll enabled
At least 4 testimonial cards are present
Each card shows avatar, quote, name, role, 5 stars, and a result badge
Glassmorphism styling applied to each card
Smooth slide transitions between testimonials

requirements.text: Build a Process section with headline 'How We Work'. Render a horizontal scrolling timeline on desktop and a vertical layout on mobile with five steps: Discover → Design → Develop → Launch → Scale. Each step has a step number, icon, title, and description. Include an animated connecting line between steps that progressively fills as the user scrolls down the page, triggered by Framer Motion scroll progress.

quotes: Each step: number, icon, title, description
Animated connecting line that fills as you scroll

acceptanceCriteria: Headline 'How We Work' is displayed
Five steps render with correct labels and descriptions
Layout is horizontal on desktop and vertical on mobile
Connecting line between steps animates fill on scroll
Each step entrance is triggered by Framer Motion whileInView

requirements.text: Build a CTA section with headline 'Let's Build Your Next Big Digital Product' and subtext 'Partner with NexNam to transform your vision into a high-performance digital reality.' The left side must contain a contact form (Name, Email, Project Type dropdown, Message textarea) built with React Hook Form including validation and a success feedback state after submission. The right side must show a 'Book a Strategy Call' button and a bullet list of benefits. Apply a bold linear gradient background (primary→secondary direction).

quotes: Contact form (Name, Email, Project Type dropdown, Message) using React Hook Form
'Book a Strategy Call' button + bullet benefits

acceptanceCriteria: Headline and subtext render with correct copy
Contact form has Name, Email, Project Type dropdown, and Message fields
React Hook Form handles validation; required fields show errors when empty
Successful form submission shows a visual success state
'Book a Strategy Call' button and benefits bullet list are on the right
Section has a bold gradient background using primary and secondary colors

requirements.text: Build a dark minimal footer with: NexNam logo + tagline, navigation links (Services, Work, About, Contact), social icons for Twitter, LinkedIn, GitHub, and Dribbble (with placeholder hrefs), email 'hello@nexnam.io', copyright line '© 2025 NexNam. All rights reserved.', and a top border gradient line using the primary-to-secondary gradient.

quotes: Social icons: Twitter, LinkedIn, GitHub, Dribbble (placeholder hrefs)

acceptanceCriteria: Footer renders at the bottom of the page with dark background
NexNam logo with tagline is displayed
Navigation links are present
Four social icon links are present with placeholder hrefs
Email and copyright text render correctly
Top border of footer is a visible gradient line from #6C63FF to #00D4FF

requirements.text: Implement performance and responsiveness optimizations across the entire SPA: lazy load all sections below the hero fold using React.lazy/Suspense, ensure all layouts are mobile-first with sm/md/lg/xl Tailwind breakpoints, limit Three.js canvas usage exclusively to the hero section, and apply Framer Motion useInView / whileInView for all scroll-triggered animations throughout the page.

quotes: Three.js canvas only in hero to avoid performance issues
Use framer-motion useInView and whileInView for scroll-triggered animations

acceptanceCriteria: Below-fold sections are wrapped in React.lazy + Suspense
All sections are responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
Three.js canvas only renders inside the hero section component
Scroll-triggered animations use Framer Motion whileInView throughout

constraints: Three.js/React Three Fiber canvas must only be used in the hero section
No backend logic required — this is a purely frontend SPA
Design tokens (colors, spacing) must be defined as CSS custom properties and Tailwind config extensions
All sections must have id attributes matching navbar anchor links
Do not use blue & purple as the sole color scheme — follow the specified #6C63FF / #00D4FF / #FF6B6B palette
nonGoals: No backend canister or Motoko logic needed
No real form submission endpoint — form feedback is UI-only
No real case study detail pages — 'Explore Case Study' buttons are placeholder CTAs
No real social media API integrations

required: Abstract futuristic dark hero background texture with subtle electric violet and cyan light streaks on near-black (#050510) canvas (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Gradient avatar portrait placeholder for Alex Morgan with initials 'AM' on violet-to-cyan radial gradient circle (avatar-alex.dim_200x200.png)
Gradient avatar portrait placeholder for Sarah Chen with initials 'SC' on cyan-to-violet radial gradient circle (avatar-sarah.dim_200x200.png)
NexNam logo mark — stylized 'N' letterform with electric violet to cyan gradient on transparent background (nexnam-logo.dim_120x120.png)
